title: Task Import
description: Schema for importing tasks via ralphctl task import or scope plan

description.description: Detailed description of what the task accomplishes

verificationCriteria.description: Definition-of-done checks used to evaluate task completion

ticketId.description: Reference to parent ticket ID (e.g., TICKET-001)

id.description: Local ID for referencing this task in blockedBy (e.g., '1', 'auth-setup'). Converted to real ID on import.

blockedBy.description: IDs of tasks that must complete first. Reference tasks by their 'id' field.

projectPath.description: Absolute path to the repository where this task should execute. Must be one of the project's paths.
